llm_recommendations.stock_name: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Limited (Adani Ports)
llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Hit a fresh life-time high; Emkay lifted target price by 5%; MSC's arm acquiring 49% stake in Adani Vizhinjam Port (AVPPL) for $1.4 billion, expected to boost cargo volumes and transhipment share. Consistently outperformed Nifty 50.
